description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: validate, build, and provision, using the hashicorp/packer:1.2.5 Docker image (with a PATH entrypoint) for validation and build jobs and hashicorp/terraform:light for the provision job. In the validate stage add a validate job that runs 'packer --version', then changes directory to packer and executes 'find . -maxdepth 1 -name "*.json" -print0 | xargs -t0n1 packer validate', and runs on all branches. In the build stage add four jobs—certify, compute, control, and loadbalancer—each set to the production environment, limited to the master branch, that cd into the packer directory and run 'packer build certify.json' (or compute.json, control.json, loadbalancer.json respectively). In the provision stage add a terraform job also in the production environment that first runs a before_script to cd into terraform, create ~/.ssh and ~/.gcloud directories, write the DIGITALOCEAN_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY to /root/.ssh/id_ed25519, export DIGITALOCEAN_TOKEN from DIGITALOCEAN_API_TOKEN, write GCP_ACCOUNT_FILE to ~/.gcloud/account.json, and execute 'terraform --version' and 'terraform init'. The terraform job then runs 'terraform validate -var commit_id=$CI_COMMIT_SHA' followed by 'terraform apply -auto-approve -lock=true -lock-timeout=10s -var commit_id=$CI_COMMIT_SHA', with no caches, artifacts, or additional services.
